infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Evoura verifies your location when you check in and out of a visit, so families and the agency can trust the visit happened at the patient's home.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Evoura lets you photograph wound progress and care moments to share with the care team and family.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Evoura lets you attach photos from your library to a visit.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Evoura verifies your location when you check in and out of a visit.

plugins.photosPermission: Evoura lets you attach photos from your library to a visit.
plugins.cameraPermission: Evoura lets you photograph wound progress and care moments during a visit.
